retry_reason: Not a wrapper; the dev_kfree_skb call is only for cleanup on error and not a refcount operation that the caller would retry.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is loopback testing (transmitting and verifying packets), not reference-count management. The only refcount operation (dev_kfree_skb on error) is incidental error handling.
